Kind Words

Our guests say it best.

Real moments, real people, real love for Layali.

★★★★★

"The ceremonial matcha latte is unlike anything I've had. I've tried matcha across Tokyo and Kyoto — Layali genuinely rivals the best. The atmosphere is everything."

Claire L.
Food Blogger · Nairobi
★★★★★

"I'm a Gold Rewards member and the perks are real. Free monthly meal, priority seating — I feel genuinely valued here. The shakshuka is perfection every single time."

Sonia M.
Architect · Westlands
★★★★★

"Booked the private garden room for our anniversary. They had rose petals on the table and a custom matcha cake. I cried. 10/10. We're back every month."

Joey & Sara
Regular Guests
★★★★★

"The vibes here are unmatched. Brought the whole squad for a Saturday hang and none of us wanted to leave. The iced matcha lattes were gone in seconds."

The Boys 🍵
Squad Goals · Nairobi
★★★★★

"Every corner of this place is Instagram-worthy, but more importantly the food actually tastes incredible. The Buddha Bowl is a permanent fixture in my week now."

N
Nadia A.
Freelance Designer
★★★★★

"I come here every morning for my espresso before work. The staff know my order, they know my name. It feels like a second home. I honestly don't know what I'd do without Layali."

D
David K.
Daily Regular · Karen
